requested_action: Perform independent read-only QA review of M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001 at fixed implementation commit eb179555d2324311e0966923a137cf81824c01ee.
review_scope: Verify actual diff against allowed_paths and forbidden_paths.
Verify selected district inspector is player-facing, localized, and consumes existing read models/command previews only.
Verify district list remains secondary with search, route-status filter, sort, folding, bounded rendering/virtualization, empty state, and selection/map sync where supported.
Verify player mode hides prototype district labels, milestone labels, raw IDs, state hash, raw reason codes, and debug diagnostics.
Verify Storybook, focused UI tests, Playwright, build, and pnpm check evidence are meaningful and passing.

Verify no sim-core, protocol, save, map-renderer, platform, content-source, docs gate/roadmap, release, telemetry, server, multiplayer, account, cloud-save, production-art, branding, M8, or manual-node-battle scope was introduced.

delivery.note: Lead sent formal QA review route to spawned qa_reviewer thread.
